rows.value: The money engine: turns **LOCKED picks × TournamentResult** into season totals, layers in commissioner adjustments, and serves every leaderboard and standings view.

`leaderboard` and `earningsAdjustment` tRPC routers; `rollupForTournament` / `recalculateSeasonForMember` called directly by [golf-data sync](../domain-golf-data/domain-golf-data.html), [pick service](../domain-game/domain-game.html), and [admin](../domain-admin/domain-admin.html).
The rollup is **idempotent** — every trigger recomputes a member's season from scratch, so re-running it is always safe (`seed:rollup` exists for exactly this).

bigIdea.label: Big idea
bigIdea.line: `LeagueMemberSeason` is a materialized rollup, not a ledger.
bigIdea.sub: Nothing ever increments the stored totals. Every trigger — tournament finalize, commissioner pick edit, adjustment add/delete — recomputes the member's whole season with one SQL aggregate over **LOCKED** picks joined to results, adds the adjustment sum, and overwrites the row. Reads (leaderboards, standings) then never touch the pick table for season totals — they do one indexed read of the cache.

blocks.title: Components
blocks.intro: Four units: the recompute core, the commissioner adjustment ledger that feeds it, the read-side leaderboard queries, and the standings UI surfaces.

cards.name: Rollup core
cards.purpose: `earnings-core.ts` + its repository — the from-scratch recompute of `LeagueMemberSeason`. Deliberately **not** `server-only` so seed scripts can run it; app code imports the `earnings.ts` guard shim instead.

cards.name: Commissioner adjustments
cards.purpose: Manual `EarningsAdjustment` credits/debits (side bets, penalties) — commissioner-gated writes, audit-logged, visible to the whole league, and folded into totals by triggering a member recompute.

cards.name: Leaderboard queries
cards.purpose: The read side: season standings (global + per-league) off the `LeagueMemberSeason` cache, live *projected* earnings from IN_PROGRESS tournaments, per-member standing lookups, and per-tournament weekly standings.

cards.name: Standings surfaces
cards.purpose: The shared weekly standings table (rank, pick, score, earnings) rendered by league and tournament pages, plus the legacy `/member/…` route that redirects to `/season/[userId]`.

blocks.title: The rollup flow
blocks.intro: Every path into the domain converges on `recalculateSeasonForMember`: two SQL aggregates, one overwrite of the cache row, and the leaderboards read only the cache.

diagram.caption: Blue nodes are the five triggers (three live in other domains). The recompute counts only `pick.status = 'LOCKED'` rows on non-excluded COMPLETED/FINALIZING tournaments.

blocks.callout: **The UPDATE never inserts.** `updateMemberSeasonStats` assumes the `LeagueMemberSeason` row already exists — [leagues](../domain-leagues/domain-leagues.html) creates it when a member joins. If the row is missing, the rollup logs `[earnings-rollup] No LeagueMemberSeason row found …` and skips the member rather than failing the whole rollup.

components.name: Rollup core
detail: Three functions, one shape: `rollupForTournament(tournamentId)` finds every member with a **LOCKED** pick on that tournament (`findAffectedMembers`) and recomputes each; `recalculateSeasonForLeague` does the same for every member of a league; both funnel into `recalculateSeasonForMember`, the single write path. It runs `calculatePickBasedStats` (one SQL aggregate over LOCKED picks joined to `tournamentResult`, restricted to `season`, `status in (COMPLETED, FINALIZING)`, `excluded = false`), adds `sumByLeagueMember` from the adjustments repo, and overwrites the `LeagueMemberSeason` row's `totalEarnings` / `totalPicks` / `totalMissedCuts`.

Missed cuts are a SQL heuristic, not a stored flag: a result row that exists with `earnings = 0` and `finish_position` null-or-zero counts as a missed cut — no result row yet means the tournament simply hasn't produced one.

The `server-only` split is the subtle part: `earnings-core.ts` and its repositories import `@/lib/db-core` and carry **no** `server-only` guard, so `prisma/seed/rollup.ts` (the `seed:rollup` npm script) can execute the exact same code from the CLI. `earnings.ts` is a three-line `server-only` re-export shim — the version app code is supposed to import. Other server services (`sync`, `pick`, `admin`) import `earnings-core` directly.

files.name: server/services/earnings-core.ts
files.desc: The rollup orchestrator — `rollupForTournament` → `recalculateSeasonForMember` → overwrite; warns and skips when the season row is missing.

files.name: server/services/earnings.ts
files.desc: `server-only` re-export of the three core functions; the safe import for app code.

files.name: server/repositories/earnings.ts
files.desc: Kysely queries on `db-core`: affected-member lookup, the pick-stats aggregate, the `leagueMemberSeason` UPDATE. All accept an optional `executor` for transactions.

exports.name: rollupForTournament
exports.desc: Recompute every member with a LOCKED pick on a tournament; idempotent; returns `{ membersUpdated }`.

exports.name: recalculateSeasonForMember
exports.desc: The single write path: pick stats + adjustment sum → overwrite one `LeagueMemberSeason` row.

exports.name: recalculateSeasonForLeague
exports.desc: Loop `recalculateSeasonForMember` over all members of a league (used by admin + `seed:rollup`).

exports.name: calculatePickBasedStats
exports.desc: One aggregate: `sum(earnings)`, `count(*)` picks, and the missed-cut `count(case …)` over LOCKED picks × results.

exports.name: updateMemberSeasonStats
exports.desc: UPDATE-only writer of the cache row; returns `numUpdatedRows` so the core can detect a missing row.

exports.name: findAffectedMembers
exports.desc: Distinct `leagueMemberId`s with a LOCKED pick on the tournament — the rollup's fan-out set.

connections.body: [golf-data](../domain-golf-data/domain-golf-data.html)'s `sync.ts` runs `rollupForTournament` when a tournament finalizes (and again while FINALIZING so projections keep flowing).
[admin](../domain-admin/domain-admin.html)'s `admin.ts` imports both recalculate functions — `triggerEarningsRollup` plus per-member recomputes after result edits.

`pick`, `tournament`, and `tournamentResult` tables — models owned by [game](../domain-game/domain-game.html) and [golf-data](../domain-golf-data/domain-golf-data.html); this domain only ever writes `leagueMemberSeason`.

components.name: Commissioner adjustments
detail: A tiny append/delete ledger for league-specific money that ESPN doesn't know about — side bets, penalties. `resolveCommissioner` gates every write: the target member and league must exist, the league must **not** be the GLOBAL league (adjustments are FORBIDDEN there), and the caller must be `league.commissionerId`. Reads are looser on purpose — `getAdjustments` lets **any** member of the league view them, for transparency.

Writes are transactional and audited: `addAdjustment` / `deleteAdjustment` wrap the `earningsAdjustment` insert/delete together with a `CommissionerAction` audit row (`ADD_ADJUSTMENT` / `DELETE_ADJUSTMENT`, details JSON-serialized) in one `withTransaction`, then trigger `recalculateSeasonForMember` outside the transaction so the stored totals absorb the change.

The router validates hard bounds — non-zero integer amount within ±999,999,999, memo 1–100 chars. `EarningsAdjustments` (client component) renders the list with signed green/red amounts and, for the commissioner, an inline add form and a confirm-to-delete flow; it calls `router.refresh()` on success so the server-rendered totals re-fetch.

files.name: server/routers/earnings-adjustment.ts
files.desc: `earningsAdjustmentRouter` — `add` / `delete` mutations, `list` query; zod bounds on amount and memo.

files.name: server/services/earnings-adjustment.ts
files.desc: Commissioner gate, GLOBAL-league block, transactional write + audit row, recompute trigger.

files.name: server/repositories/earnings-adjustment.ts
files.desc: insert / delete / find / `sumByLeagueMember` (the coalesce-to-0 sum the rollup folds in); joins `user` for `createdByName`.

files.name: components/earnings/earnings-adjustments.tsx
files.desc: Client UI: adjustment list, commissioner add form, confirm-to-delete. Hidden entirely when empty and viewer isn't commissioner.

exports.name: earningsAdjustmentRouter
exports.desc: tRPC surface: `earningsAdjustment.add` / `.delete` / `.list`.

exports.name: addAdjustment
exports.desc: Gate → insert + `ADD_ADJUSTMENT` audit in one tx → recompute member season.

exports.name: deleteAdjustment
exports.desc: Gate → delete + `DELETE_ADJUSTMENT` audit in one tx → recompute member season.

exports.name: getAdjustments
exports.desc: Any-member read of a member's adjustments (transparency rule).

exports.name: sumByLeagueMember
exports.desc: The number the rollup adds on top of pick-based earnings.

exports.name: EarningsAdjustments
exports.desc: Client component rendered on the season pages; commissioner-only mutations inline.

connections.body: [leagues](../domain-leagues/domain-leagues.html)' `leagueRepo` for `findMemberById` / `findLeagueById` (the gate) and `createCommissionerAction` (the audit trail rendered on the league page).
`recalculateSeasonForMember` in [the rollup core](#c-rollup) after every write — an adjustment is invisible until the cache row is recomputed.
[game](../domain-game/domain-game.html)'s `/season` pages fetch `earningsAdjustment.list` and render `EarningsAdjustments` under the member's season stats.

[leagues](../domain-leagues/domain-leagues.html) — `leagueRepo.deleteEarningsAdjustments` purges a member's adjustments when they're removed from a league (a cross-domain write into `earnings_adjustment`).

components.name: Leaderboard queries
detail: The read side never aggregates picks for season totals — `findStandings` is a straight join of `leagueMemberSeason` × `leagueMember` (ACTIVE only) × `user`, ordered by `totalEarnings desc` with a stable secondary sort on member id (a `TODO` in the repo admits there's no real tiebreaker yet). `getGlobalStandings` (public, for the home page) and `getLeagueStandings` (membership-gated) share the same four-query `Promise.all`: standings page, total count, projected earnings, and the leader's max for `diffFromLeader`.

**Projected earnings are display-only.** `findProjectedEarnings` sums results from `IN_PROGRESS` tournaments per member — live money that is deliberately *not* in `totalEarnings` and never persisted; it decorates each standings row so the UI can show what's pending this week.

Weekly standings invert the join direction: `findWeeklyStandings` starts from `leagueMember` and LEFT JOINs the LOCKED pick for one tournament, so members **without** a pick still appear; the service splits rows into `picks` (ranked by earnings, then score-to-par) and `membersWithoutPicks`. `memberStanding` / `memberStandingByUser` are the single-row lookups behind the member season pages, both verifying the caller shares the league first.

files.name: server/services/leaderboard.ts
files.desc: Membership gates, pagination math, rank/diffFromLeader/projected decoration, weekly pick vs no-pick split.

files.name: server/repositories/leaderboard.ts
files.desc: The Kysely queries: season standings off the cache, projected-earnings map, leader max, weekly LEFT-JOIN standings, counts.

exports.name: leaderboardRouter
exports.desc: The domain's main tRPC surface (5 procedures).

exports.name: getGlobalStandings
exports.desc: Public standings for `GLOBAL_LEAGUE_ID` — powers the signed-out home page leaderboard.

exports.name: getLeagueStandings
exports.desc: Same shape, membership-gated, for the league page season table.

exports.name: getWeeklyStandings
exports.desc: Per-tournament rows split into `picks` + `membersWithoutPicks`.

exports.name: getMemberStandingByUser
exports.desc: userId → member → standing; the season pages' entry lookup.

exports.name: findProjectedEarnings
exports.desc: memberId → live IN_PROGRESS earnings map (display-only, never stored).

exports.name: findLeaderEarnings
exports.desc: `max(total_earnings)` for the league — the anchor for `diffFromLeader`.

exports.name: findWeeklyStandings
exports.desc: LEFT JOIN from members so no-pick members surface; ordered by earnings then score-to-par.

connections.body: `leagueMemberSeason` (this domain's cache) for season totals; `pick` × `tournamentResult` only for the *projected* and *weekly* lenses.

[leagues](../domain-leagues/domain-leagues.html)' `leagueRepo.findMemberByUserAndLeague` for every membership gate; `GLOBAL_LEAGUE_ID` comes from [web-shell](../domain-web-shell/domain-web-shell.html)'s `lib/constants`.

[web-shell](../domain-web-shell/domain-web-shell.html)'s home page (`leaderboard.global`), [leagues](../domain-leagues/domain-leagues.html)' league page (`leaderboard.byLeague` + `weeklyStandings`), [game](../domain-game/domain-game.html)'s season pages (`memberStandingByUser`), and [golf-data](../domain-golf-data/domain-golf-data.html)'s tournament page (`weeklyStandings`).

components.name: Standings surfaces
detail: `WeeklyStandingsTable` is the one shared standings renderer: ranked pick rows (member link, golfer avatar + link, live finish position, color-coded score-to-par, earnings with an `est.` tag when `isLive`) followed by dimmed no-pick rows — mirroring the `picks` / `membersWithoutPicks` split the service returns. The caller's own row is highlighted via `currentUserId`. It collapses responsively: on mobile the golfer moves under the member name.

`/member/[leagueId]/[memberId]` is a legacy server page kept only as a redirect: it resolves memberId → userId through `leaderboard.memberStanding` (setting the active-league cookie on the way) and forwards to `/season/[userId]`, falling back to `/season` if the lookup fails.

files.name: components/league/weekly-standings-table.tsx
files.desc: Shared weekly standings table; pick rows + no-pick rows, live `est.` earnings, current-user highlight.

files.name: app/member/[leagueId]/[memberId]/page.tsx
files.desc: Legacy route → resolves member to user via `leaderboard.memberStanding`, redirects to `/season/[userId]`.

exports.name: WeeklyStandingsTable
exports.desc: Rendered by the league page's week view and the tournament page.

exports.name: default
exports.desc: The redirect-only member page (async server component).

connections.body: [leagues](../domain-leagues/domain-leagues.html)' `/league/[id]` week view and [golf-data](../domain-golf-data/domain-golf-data.html)'s `/tournament/[id]` page — both feed it `leaderboard.weeklyStandings` output.

blocks.title: Data it owns
blocks.intro: Two tables: the materialized season cache and the manual adjustment ledger.

rows.name: LeagueMemberSeason
rows.desc: One row per member per season (`@@unique([leagueMemberId, season])`): `totalEarnings`, `totalPicks`, `totalMissedCuts`. **Write-owned here, row-created elsewhere** — [leagues](../domain-leagues/domain-leagues.html) inserts the row when a member joins; this domain only UPDATEs it.

rows.name: EarningsAdjustment
rows.desc: Commissioner ledger entries: signed integer `amount`, required `memo`, `createdById` (relation `earningsAdjustmentsCreated` on `User`). Summed into `totalEarnings` on every recompute.

blocks.note: The raw money inputs — `Pick` and `TournamentResult` — belong to [game](../domain-game/domain-game.html) and [golf-data](../domain-golf-data/domain-golf-data.html); this domain reads them but never writes them. `CommissionerAction` audit rows written by adjustments belong to [leagues](../domain-leagues/domain-leagues.html).

blocks.title: Seams
blocks.intro: Two tRPC routers outward, three service functions callable by neighbor services, three domains leaned on.

exposes.note: **public** — season standings for the global league; the signed-out home page leaderboard.
Paginated league standings with rank, projected earnings, `diffFromLeader`.
One tournament's picks + no-pick members for a league; league and tournament pages.
Single member's season row by memberId (also the legacy `/member` redirect's lookup).
Same, keyed by userId — what `/season/[userId]` uses.
Commissioner-only; blocked on the GLOBAL league; audited; triggers recompute.

blocks.note: Beyond tRPC, the load-bearing seam is **service-to-service**: `rollupForTournament` / `recalculateSeasonForMember` / `recalculateSeasonForLeague` are imported directly by [golf-data](../domain-golf-data/domain-golf-data.html)'s sync, [game](../domain-game/domain-game.html)'s commissioner pick mutations, [admin](../domain-admin/domain-admin.html), and the `seed:rollup` script. Dependencies going out: `getCurrentSeason` from golf-data's `lib/season`, `leagueRepo` membership/commissioner/audit helpers from leagues, and `db` / `db-core` / `withTransaction` / `GLOBAL_LEAGUE_ID` / `lib/format` from web-shell.
